description: Comprehensive Kong Gateway monitoring dashboard using Prometheus metrics
title: Kong Gateway - Prometheus

widgets.description: Total number of HTTP requests processed by Kong Gateway
widgets.title: Total Requests

widgets.description: Number of active connections to Kong Gateway
widgets.title: Active Connections

widgets.description: Kong Gateway uptime in seconds since start
widgets.title: Uptime

widgets.description: CPU usage percentage of Kong Gateway process
widgets.title: CPU Usage

widgets.description: Memory usage of Kong Gateway process in bytes
widgets.title: Memory Usage

widgets.description: Rate of HTTP requests per second processed by Kong
widgets.title: Request Rate

widgets.description: Distribution of HTTP response status codes (2xx, 4xx, 5xx)
widgets.title: Response Status Codes

widgets.description: Average size of incoming HTTP requests in bytes
widgets.title: Request Size

widgets.description: Average size of HTTP responses in bytes
widgets.title: Response Size

widgets.description: Average request latency in milliseconds
widgets.title: Average Request Latency

widgets.description: Request latency percentiles (50th, 90th, 99th)
widgets.title: Request Latency Percentiles

widgets.description: Average upstream latency in milliseconds
widgets.title: Upstream Latency

widgets.description: Total number of error responses (4xx and 5xx status codes)
widgets.title: Total Errors

widgets.description: Error rate as percentage of total requests
widgets.title: Error Rate

widgets.description: Distribution of specific error status codes
widgets.title: Error Codes Distribution

widgets.description: Kong datastore connectivity status (1 = reachable, 0 = unreachable)
widgets.title: Datastore Status

widgets.description: Upstream success rate as percentage of total upstream requests
widgets.title: Upstream Success Rate

widgets.description: Number of currently active upstreams
widgets.title: Active Upstreams

widgets.description: Average upstream response time across all upstreams
widgets.title: Upstream Response Time

widgets.description: Nginx connection states (active, reading, writing, waiting)
widgets.title: Nginx Connections

widgets.description: Request rate per route/service breakdown
widgets.title: Requests per Route/Service

widgets.title: Bandwidth Usage
